cost_explanation:
Ollama Cloud does not publish per-token prices — it bills on GPU time consumed,
which depends on model size (usage level 1–4) and request duration.
We therefore show two cost columns:
  - groq_equivalent_usd: what the same token volume would cost on Groq for the
    nearest equivalent model family. Use this to sanity-check token efficiency.
  - openai_equivalent_usd: same calculation against gpt-4o-mini as a market anchor.
To convert to Ollama Cloud subscription cost: divide your Pro/Max plan monthly fee
by your estimated monthly call count. VocalMind's 3-chain trigger runs ~24 LLM
calls per interaction (3 chains × ~8 windows). At 500 interactions/month that is
~12,000 calls/month → $0.0017/call on Pro, $0.0083/call on Max.

results.raw_response:
```json
{
  "verdict": "Contradiction",
  "nli_category": "Contradiction",
  "justification": "Agent promises a card refund within 72 hours, contradicting the policy which states refunds are processed as bill credits within 5–7 business days.",
  "evidence_quotes": ["Refunds for service outages are processed within 5–7 business days as bill credits, not card refunds.","I'll push the refund to your card within 72 hours."],
  "citations": [{"source": "policy","quote":"Refunds for service outages are processed within 5–7 business days as bill credits, not card refunds."}, {"source": "transcript","quote":"I'll push the refund to your card within 72 hours."}],
  "confidence_score": 0.98,
  "policy_alignment_score": 0.02
}
```

```json
{
  "verdict": "Contradiction",
  "nli_category": "Contradiction",
  "justification": "Agent promises card refund within 72 hours, violating policy which mandates bill credits (not card refunds) processed within 5–7 business days.",
  "evidence_quotes": ["bill credits, not card refunds", "5–7 business days", "push the refund to your card", "within 72 hours"],
  "citations": [
    {"source": "policy", "quote": "Refunds for service outages are processed within 5–7 business days as bill credits, not card refunds."},
    {"source": "transcript", "quote": "I'll push the refund to your card within 72 hours."}
  ],
  "confidence_score": 0.96,
  "policy_alignment_score": 0.08
}
```
